title: (Bullish Signal) BGFV, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram turned positive on $June 1, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling BGFV's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 44 similar cases where BGFV's MACD histogram became positive, and 38 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 86%. Current price $33.29 crossed the support line at $31.51 and is trading between $33.73 resistance and $31.51 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/29/21 - 06/01/21, the price experienced a +82% Uptrend. During the week of 05/24/21 - 06/01/21, the stock enjoyed a +12% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/b6pn9r0apv271.png?width=1522&format=png&auto=webp&s=573cd28a9e12085eb74b695320f196616bc5e25a

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on May 26, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on BGFV as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 64 of 81 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

Following a +4.83% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where BGFV advanced for three days, in 230 of 282 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 208 of 265 cases where BGFV Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 78%.
